# Anurag Anant Mishra

Anurag Anant Mishra is an AI, MarTech and Digital Analytics authority focused on practical architecture for customer data, personalization, analytics automation and applied AI engineering.

## Site

- Home: https://www.anuraganantmishra.in/
- About: https://www.anuraganantmishra.in/about
- Expertise: https://www.anuraganantmishra.in/expertise
- Portfolio: https://www.anuraganantmishra.in/portfolio
- Contact: https://www.anuraganantmishra.in/contact
- Case Studies: https://www.anuraganantmishra.in/case-studies
- Insights — Adobe + GA4 Tag Governance: https://www.anuraganantmishra.in/adobe-ga4-tag-governance

## Core Topics

- Artificial Intelligence and applied AI engineering
- MarTech architecture
- Digital Analytics
- Adobe Experience Platform
- Adobe Target, including experience targeting, recommendations, personalization and A/B testing
- Customer Journey Analytics
- Google Analytics 4
- Google Tag Manager
- Enterprise Analytics Automation
- Privacy-aware measurement and personalization

## Content Boundaries

This site keeps proprietary implementation details out of public content. Portfolio content describes capability areas instead of real implementations.

## Writing

- Adobe Experience Cloud + GA4 Tag Governance in Multi-Market MarTech: a practical, experience-led guide to data layer discipline, consent-gated tagging, and automated tag QA across markets. https://www.anuraganantmishra.in/adobe-ga4-tag-governance
